events.event_description: U.S. Ambassador Nonresident relations established with Seychelles. Anthony Dryden Marshall presented credentials on 1976-07-01 and was resident in Nairobi, not in Seychelles.

evidence.quote: Anthony Dryden Marshall, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1976-06-30. Credentials presented: 1976-07-01. Left Nairobi 1977-04-26.
